title: Event
description: Gruper Distributed audit event record. Append-only; never updated or deleted. Hash-chained from gd-0.5 (WP-17) for tamper-evidence. This is the compliance record for LLC recordkeeping, pharma audit trails, observatory run logs, and regulated-industry audits.

id.description: Primary key. UUID v4. Monotonically increasing by insertion order within the same millisecond (use ts + id for deterministic ordering).

ts.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of the event. Stored with microsecond precision.

actor_id.description: User.id or Agent.id of the entity that triggered this event. For system-generated events (e.g. timeout), the system service UUID is used.

action.description: Machine-readable event type. All state transitions for tasks, agents, tokens, and users produce audit events.

subject_id.description: UUID of the primary affected resource: Task.id, Agent.id, ShareToken.id, User.id, or Pool.id depending on action.

secondary_subject_id.description: UUID of a secondary affected resource where applicable (e.g. for task_dispatched: the assigned Agent.id; for token_used: the Task.id).

payload_hash.description: SHA-256 hex hash of the event's associated payload content. For task events: hash of the task input blob (never plaintext content). For auth events: hash of the token claims. Null if no payload.

prev_hash.description: entry_hash of the immediately preceding event in the append-only chain. Null for the first event and for all events before gd-0.5 (WP-17). When non-null, a gap or mismatch indicates tampering.

entry_hash.description: SHA-256 hex hash of this event, computed as: SHA-256(ts ‖ actor_id ‖ action ‖ subject_id ‖ payload_hash ‖ prev_hash). All fields encoded as UTF-8 strings, concatenated with '|' as separator. Null for events created before gd-0.5 (WP-17). A verifier checks: entry_hash == SHA-256(computed value) AND prev_hash == entry_hash of preceding record.

metadata.description: Non-sensitive structured metadata for the event. Examples: {'model': 'llama3.1:70b', 'duration_ms': 4200} for task_complete; {'reason': 'quota_exceeded'} for task_revoked. Never contains payload content or PII.

HashChainNote.description: Hash chain computation details (informational, not a schema field).

note.const: Implemented at gd-0.5 (WP-17). Pre-gd-0.5 events have prev_hash=null and entry_hash=null. The chain begins from the first event after WP-17 closes.
